description: Middesk provides business identity, verification, compliance, fraud, and entity-management infrastructure. It helps companies verify businesses, assess risk, monitor changes, and manage registration workflows.
summary: Middesk exposes a REST API, a GraphQL API at `https://api.middesk.com/graphql`, and an MCP server at `https://mcp.middesk.com/mcp`/`https://mcp.middesk.com/sse`; all require Middesk-issued API credentials, with documented Bearer auth for GraphQL and MCP and REST examples showing authenticated access to `https://api.middesk.com/v1`.
